name: Running Finish
preceding_figure_names: Back Lock, Cross Swivel, Hover Corte, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Progressive Chasse
following_figure_names: Forward Lock Step, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn, Quick Open Reverse, Fish Tail, Four Quick Run, V6, Tipsy To L, Six Quick Run
notes:
Timing can also be: QQSS
Can be commenced in other alignments, e.g. starting BLOD, ending DC.
Man may turn 1/4 between 1-2 when a facing alignment would be used. Lady would turn 1/8 between 1-2 and 1/8 between 2-3.
Really drive the step, go through Man.
Man should shape left to allow lady to pass and to make the turn easier.
Lady can turn 1/8, will end BDW on new LOD.
Lower and push off standing R leg, bigger next step.

steps.action: LF back in CBMP | Backing DW | Start to turn R | Sway(S) | CBM | Rise e/o 1
RF to side and slightly fwd | Pointing to LOD | 3/8 between 1-2, body turns less | Sway(L) | Up
comments: Man can turn 1/4 to end DW on new LOD
Man should shape left to allow lady to pass and to make the turn easier

steps.action: LF fwd preparing to step OP left side leading | Facing LOD | TH | Body turn to R | Sway(L) | Up, lower e/o 3
RF fwd in CBMP, OP | Facing LOD | H | - | Sway(S) | CBM
RF fwd in CBMP, OP | Facing DW | HT | Start to turn R | Sway(S) | CBM | Rise e/o 1
LF to side | Backing DC | 1/4 between 1-2 | Sway(R) | -- | Up
RF back, R side leading | Backing LOD | 1/8 between 2-3 | Sway(R) | -- | Up, lower e/o 3
LF back in CBMP | Backing LOD | T | Sway(S)
